bridge_equation_v28.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v28 = mix(B_plastic_v27, L_stable_plus, 1 - P_stable_plus, D_feature_v22, 1 - G_brain_v22)
bridge_equation_v28.structure_term: B_struct_v28 = mix(B_struct_v27, S_stable_plus, R_stable_plus, 1 - P_stable_plus, D_structure_v22)
bridge_equation_v28.readiness_term: R_train_v28 = mix(R_train_v27, B_plastic_v28, B_struct_v28, R_stable_plus, D_align_v22, 1 - P_stable_plus)

project_readout.summary: 训练终式第二十八桥开始吸收稳定放大强化和脑编码第二十二版，检查放大趋势是否继续落成更低风险的规则层承接。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把第二十八桥并回主核，验证稳定放大是否继续走向低风险稳态施工区。
